summary: Frontend-only testing of QuietZones FIX 1 (free-pan map + recenter-btn), FIX 2 (embedded MapPicker click-to-pick in AddPlaceDialog), FIX 3 (Nominatim place search). All three fixes verified working end-to-end on Riyadh fake geolocation (24.7136, 46.6753).
critical_code_review_comments: PlaceSearch.jsx: Nominatim usage policy requires a descriptive User-Agent/Referer; browser fetch sends default Referer which is usually OK but for production-volume traffic OSM may block. Consider self-hosted geocoder or a back-end proxy long-term.
PlaceSearch.jsx: Loading flag never set false on AbortError - if user types fast, the spinner could remain visible after an aborted request (minor; subsequent debounced fetch will re-toggle).
PlaceSearch.jsx: Results dropdown closes only after pick or new query; clicking outside the input does not close it. Add an onBlur or outside-click handler for polish.

MapView.jsx FlyToTrigger uses flyTo with duration:0.8 - on slow devices the animation may queue up if user double-clicks recenter-btn quickly; consider stopping animation first (map.stop()) before flyTo.

MapPicker.jsx Recenterer effect calls map.setView on every pos change (not only via flyTrigger) because pos is in the dependency array. This means the picker WILL recenter every time lat/lng updates (e.g., after user clicks map). For a tap-to-pick this is acceptable but you may prefer to only recenter on explicit trigger - currently the dep array is [trigger, pos, map] which fires on both. Functionally fine in tests.

AddPlaceDialog.jsx parses parseFloat(form.lat) for MapPicker even when empty string -> NaN; component guards with Number.isFinite so safe, but emits an empty map (no marker) until user picks - which is intended.
seed_data_creation: None - no places persisted in this iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Selectors verified working: recenter-btn (Home), add-place-fab, add-place-dialog, place-search-input, place-search, search-results, search-result-0..N, map-picker, place-name-input, place-lat-input, place-lng-input, use-current-location-btn, close-add-place. FIX 1: dragged map 150px and waited 3.5s - did NOT auto-recenter (verified visually - user marker offset). FIX 2: clicking map-picker updated lat/lng inputs (48.858890 -> 48.857502). FIX 3: typing 'Paris' returned Nominatim results within ~2s after 450ms debounce; clicking search-result-0 set lat=48.858890, lng=2.320041, name='Paris' and recentered MapPicker via flyTrigger. 'No results' message appears for bogus query 'zzqqxxooppllkkjj'. EN placeholder = 'Search for a place...'. AR placeholder NOT directly toggled because the language toggle data-testid 'lang-toggle-ar' was not found on /settings - the strings ARE present in i18n.js for both EN/AR (search_place + tap_map_hint) so translation should work; main agent may want to verify Arabic toggle selector if needed.
rca of the issue: n/a - all 3 fixes work as designed.
